name: Avery Rock Gym
description: Avery Rock Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Newland, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Linville Ridge Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Linville Ridge Country Club in Linville, NC! There are 8 outdoor clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Mountain Glen Golf Club
description: Come play pickleball at Mountain Glen Golf Club in Newland, NC! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Williams YMCA of Avery County
description: Williams YMCA of Avery County is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Linville, NC. There are 3 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved.
fees: Members only — Free for Members / Non-members pay a $10 guest fee (includes all y amenities for the day)
